name: Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs and sells computer software and hardware. It also engages in trading activities; and provision of game software and information software programming services. The company was formerly known as Wayi International Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. in June 2000. Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
